name: Polo Fundo de Investimento Imobiliario ‚Äì FII Recebiveis Imobiliarios IMO - Cotas Fund
summary: Polo Fundo de Investimento Imobiliario – FII Recebiveis Imobiliarios IMO - Cotas Fund is a Brazilian real estate investment fund focused on investing in real estate receivables. The fund aims to generate income by investing in credit rights backed by real estate assets. It is based in Brazil.
